key_findings: Centralized types.yaml is a viable approach - single source of truth for all types
All numeric types, bit vectors, and enums accessible from generated Types.bsv
Centralized registry improves reusability: one change updates all modules
ID=0.60 when accounting for total type coverage (Settings+Headers)
project.yaml adds configuration overhead (~40 lines for project config + templates)
LIS=0 maintained - all type descriptions are language-independent
next_actions: Scale centralized types to include structs (BTH, AETH, RETH)
Add connection-layer YAML for module instantiation and wiring
Test full Bottom-Up chain: types → Settings → Headers → downstream module
